name: ticketwright
description: Ticketwright — a tool-agnostic AI layer for ticket-driven work repos (recall, object index, deep QC, self-maintaining catalog).

plugins.name: ticketwright
plugins.description: Tool-agnostic AI layer for ticket-driven work repos: prior-art recall, object reverse-index, deep adversarial QC, and a self-maintaining ticket index. Stdlib-only, no vector store.
